fields.description: Stable identifier used everywhere (DB, Python, n8n, JSON). Lowercase, no spaces. e.g. 'illumenate', 'lighting_206'.
fields.label: Brand Code

fields.description: Exactly one brand should be marked default; used for back-compat fallbacks during migration.
fields.label: Is Default

fields.description: Optional per-brand n8n webhook URL to trigger immediate sync.
fields.label: n8n Webhook URL

fields.description: Name of the Webflow API credential in n8n (e.g. 'webflowApi_illumenate', 'webflowApi_lighting_206').
fields.label: n8n Webflow Credential Name

fields.description: When enabled, configurator payload (configurator-options-json, is-configurable-3, min/max-length-mm) is emitted to this brand's Webflow site.
fields.label: Include Configurator Payload

fields.description: Optional override for the ERPNext base URL used when converting relative file paths to absolute. Defaults to https://illumenatelighting.v.frappe.cloud.
fields.label: ERPNext Base URL Override

fields.description: Optional Webflow public site URL pattern (e.g. https://illumenate.com); used to build 'Open in Webflow' links.
fields.label: Webflow Public Site URL

fields.description: One row per Webflow CMS collection for this brand (Products, Categories, Series, CCT, Finish, ...).
fields.label: Collections
